offense: Breach in observing the obligation of Data Fiduciary to take reasonable security safeguards to prevent personal data breach under sub-section (5) of section 8.
penalty_amount: May extend to two hundred and fifty crore rupees
criteria: As determined by Board under section 33(2): nature, gravity, duration; type and nature of personal data; repetitive nature; gain/loss; mitigation; proportionality; impact on the person.

offense: Breach in observing the obligation to give the Board or affected Data Principal notice of a personal data breach under sub-section (6) of section 8.
penalty_amount: May extend to two hundred crore rupees

offense: Breach in observance of additional obligations in relation to children under section 9.
penalty_amount: May extend to two hundred crore rupees

offense: Breach in observance of additional obligations of Significant Data Fiduciary under section 10.
penalty_amount: May extend to one hundred and fifty crore rupees

offense: Breach in observance of the duties under section 15 (duties of Data Principal).
penalty_amount: May extend to ten thousand rupees
criteria: Same as above, but note lower maximum.

offense: Breach of any term of voluntary undertaking accepted by the Board under section 32.
penalty_amount: Up to the extent applicable for the breach in respect of which the proceedings under section 28 were instituted.
criteria: Same as above, but linked to original breach.

offense: Breach of any other provision of this Act or the rules made thereunder.
penalty_amount: May extend to fifty crore rupees
